description: Declarative local workspace registry for the TRIZEL validation bridge. Every repository required for bridge execution must be declared here. No repository may be used unless listed. No path is invented; pending entries use explicit placeholder values.

repositories.description: Controlled validation reconstruction repository. Bridge execution originates here.
repositories.expected_local_path: PLACEHOLDER: confirm absolute local path to trizel-ai/Auto-dz-act checkout

repositories.description: Raw immutable source repository. Provides unprocessed observational data for extraction.
repositories.expected_local_path: PLACEHOLDER: confirm absolute local path to AUTO-DZ-ACT-3I-ATLAS-DAILY checkout

repositories.description: Normalised / epistemic / processed source repository. Provides analysis outputs for extraction.
repositories.expected_local_path: PLACEHOLDER: confirm absolute local path to AUTO-DZ-ACT-ANALYSIS-3I-ATLAS checkout
